prompt: Build a landing page for a SaaS product called 'Lumen' that helps remote teams run better async standups. Include a hero section, features section, and a CTA. Single HTML file, no external dependencies except Google Fonts.

assertions.text: Does NOT use Inter, Roboto, Arial, or system-ui as primary display font
Does NOT use a purple/violet gradient as the hero background
Hero layout is NOT a simple centered-text block (has grid, split, asymmetric, or editorial structure)
Uses CSS custom properties (--variables) for colors
Includes at least one CSS animation or keyframe (beyond simple hover transitions)
Has a clear, intentional aesthetic POV (editorial, brutalist, minimal, etc.) — not generic 'SaaS landing page' look
